title: Horses Can Swim
description: This mod makes horses swim through water when ridden by players.
body:
This mod makes horses swim through water when ridden by players.

 

This seems like a easy mod I have made and ripped it from Quark to make it a single mod!

 

Credit goes to the original Quark modders.

 

Backport it?

NO! It will always go through latest versions.
